plugins.name: toolu
plugins.description: toolu workflow core: brainstorm → spec → plan → execution → test skills, agents, slash commands, and the hook engine.

plugins.name: ast-grep
plugins.description: Structural code search & rewrite (ast-grep) with a registry-driven Grep→ast-grep nudge hook.

plugins.name: comemory
plugins.description: Persistent agent memory + code-index search (comemory) with registry-driven scope enforcement and a statusline memory-count publisher.

plugins.name: rust-quality
plugins.description: Rust PostToolUse quality checks via the toolu registry.

plugins.name: ts-quality
plugins.description: TypeScript PostToolUse quality checks via the toolu registry.

plugins.name: statusline
plugins.description: Optional Claude Code statusline: model, effort, context, quality-gate marker, folder, branch, caveman mode. Standalone, no dependencies.

plugins.name: code-review
plugins.description: Project-tuned pre-push code review mirroring the CI review bot's checklist; writes the toolu push-review state so the gate passes. Standalone, no dependencies.

plugins.name: pr-babysit
plugins.description: Babysit a PR: fetch unresolved review comments + the CI review bot's verdict, triage, fix, reply, resolve, and chase findings to zero until CI is green. Cron-driven.

plugins.name: context7
plugins.description: Library documentation & code-example lookup via Context7 (skill + REST wrapper). Standalone, no dependencies.

plugins.name: exa-search
plugins.description: Web, code, and URL search plus deep research via Exa (skill + REST wrapper). Standalone, no dependencies.
